question: What is the full list of hook events a charm can observe? List them all.

claude_output.result:
Here is the **complete list of all hook events** a Juju charm can observe:

---

### Lifecycle Hooks
| Hook | Description |
|---|---|
| `install` | Fired once when the unit is first deployed |
| `config-changed` | Fired when the charm's configuration changes |
| `start` | Fired after `install` to start the workload |
| `stop` | Fired when the unit is about to be shut down |
| `remove` | Fired when the unit is being destroyed |
| `upgrade-charm` | Fired when the charm is upgraded |
| `update-status` | Fired periodically (every ~5 minutes) for health checks |

### Leadership Hooks
| Hook | Description |
|---|---|
| `leader-elected` | Fired when the unit becomes the leader |
| `leader-settings-changed` | Fired on non-leader units when leader settings change |

### Relation Hooks
| Hook | Description |
|---|---|
| `<endpoint>-relation-created` | Fired when a relation is first established |
| `<endpoint>-relation-joined` | Fired when a new unit joins the relation |
| `<endpoint>-relation-changed` | Fired when relation data is updated |
| `<endpoint>-relation-departed` | Fired when a unit leaves the relation |
| `<endpoint>-relation-broken` | Fired when the relation is fully removed |

### Storage Hooks
| Hook | Description |
|---|---|
| `<storage>-storage-attached` | Fired when a storage volume is attached |
| `<storage>-storage-detaching` | Fired when a storage volume is about to be detached |

### Secret Hooks
| Hook | Description |
|---|---|
| `secret-changed` | Fired when a tracked secret's content changes |
| `secret-expired` | Fired when a secret's expiry time is reached |
| `secret-rotate` | Fired when a secret's rotation interval is reached |
| `secret-remove` | Fired when a secret revision can be removed |

### Workload / Pebble Hooks *(Kubernetes charms only)*
| Hook | Description |
|---|---|
| `<container>-pebble-ready` | Fired when the Pebble agent in a container is ready |
| `<container>-pebble-custom-notice` | Fired on a Pebble custom notice |
| `<container>-pebble-check-failed` | Fired when a Pebble health check fails |
| `<container>-pebble-check-recovered` | Fired when a Pebble health check recovers |

### Upgrade Series Hooks
| Hook | Description |
|---|---|
| `pre-series-upgrade` | Fired before a machine's OS series is upgraded |
| `post-series-upgrade` | Fired after a machine's OS series is upgraded |

---

**Total: 28 distinct hook event types.** The hooks prefixed with `<endpoint>`, `<storage>`, or `<container>` are parameterized — the placeholder is replaced by the actual name defined in your charm's `charmcraft.yaml` (e.g., `database-relation-joined`, `data-storage-attached`, `redis-pebble-ready`).
